pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-009 (Data Quality) scores 0.456 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for AI/ML Platform Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.456 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality KSA DQ-S-009 as a discrete competency for AI/ML Platform Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against AI/ML Platform Architect market data. Data quality content is governance/reporting, not ML quality for platform. Score 0.456 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data quality content is governance/reporting, not ML quality for platform. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: Data quality content is governance/reporting, not ML quality for platform.
